name: Progressive Estimation
description: AI skill for estimating AI-assisted and hybrid human+agent development work. Research-backed formulas from METR data, PERT statistics, progressive disclosure design, Small Council validation, and calibration feedback loops. Zero dependencies.
review: Sets a new standard for research-backed estimation skills. METR research-grounded formulas with progressive disclosure design and Small Council validation. Modular reference architecture makes it highly extensible.
